case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. NINA TROTH et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 HOURS
